SLA Metric: 181 hours productivity loss since 5/14/2026; Network disruptions in DEV/QA
Risk Title: Critical Infrastructure Downtime Causing Cascading Productivity Loss

Potential Impact: Continued productivity loss exceeding 181+ hours; cascading schedule delays across all releases; reduced code quality; team morale degradation; increased project costs; potential SLA breaches; delayed Release 1 go-live; contract penalties
